name: AI Workspace & Computer Assistant

models.name: AiWorkspaceSession
models.description: Per-user persistent chat sessions with title auto-generated from first message, token/message counters, context JSONB

models.name: AiWorkspaceMessage
models.description: All chat messages (user/assistant), with commandType, JSONB result, provider, requiresApproval flag, approved/approvedBy

models.name: AiWorkspaceMemory
models.description: Cross-session key-value memory scoped to user/team/tenant, with TTL expiry and auto-learn source tracking

models.name: AiWorkspaceCommand
models.description: Audit log of all AI commands: document/task/dashboard creation requests with full approval gate: pending→approved/rejected

intentEngine.detection: RegExp keyword matching against user message — 6 intent patterns, default=general

functions: buildSystemPrompt(commandType, memoryContext) — type-specific system prompt with golden rule safety constraints baked in
generateRenoBrainResponse(message, commandType) — 7 distinct response templates per intent type
createOrGetSession(tenantId, userId, sessionId?) — idempotent session management
chat(params) — full pipeline: session→user message→intent detection→search (if search)→memory context→Reno Brain response→assistant message→session update→command log (if approval needed)→auto-learn
approveCommand(commandId, tenantId, userId) — sets approved + executedAt
workspaceAssistant.approvalGate: document, task, dashboard commands automatically set requiresApproval=true and create AiWorkspaceCommand record in 'pending' status

functions: buildMemoryContext(tenantId, userId) — formats memories as context string for AI prompts
autoLearnFromConversation(params) — detects preferred_command and preferred_language (Arabic detection) from conversation

workspaceSearch.searchAll: Parallel search across 5 real Prisma models
modules: SysAuditLog — by action, entityType, ordered by occurredAt

endpoints.description: Main chat — creates session if needed, detects intent, returns AI response with commandType and requiresApproval flag
List user sessions ordered by last activity
Delete session and all its messages
Get all active memories for user (respects TTL)
Save/upsert memory item with optional TTL
Universal search across 5 Reno modules, returns grouped results
Command history with optional userId/status filter

pages.description: Main AI assistant chat interface: left sidebar (session list + new chat + nav links), right chat area (user/assistant bubbles with command type badges, approval warnings), quick prompt cards on empty state, Reno Brain badge in header, typing dots while sending, session auto-title from first message
Universal search: search bar with live loading, results grouped by module (People, Recent Activity, AI Tasks, Workspace Chat) with module icons and color coding, direct links to records
Memory management: list all memories with scope badges (user/team/tenant), source label (auto-learned/manual), expiry indicator, add-memory modal with key/value/scope/ttl, one-click delete per memory
Command approvals: filter tabs (all/pending/approved/rejected), pending-count badge, amber warning alert for pending commands, approve/reject buttons per command, status badges with icons

search.action: Searches real Prisma data + returns structured results

document.action: Drafts document and creates pending command for approval

dashboard.action: Designs dashboard config and creates pending command for approval

task.action: Drafts task and creates pending command for approval

analyze.action: Analyzes provided content and extracts key information

general.action: Contextual Q&A with workspace capabilities overview

safetyChecks.destructiveActionsGated: document, task, dashboard commands require approval before system modification
safetyChecks.memoryRespectsTTL: Expired memories excluded from all queries and context building
safetyChecks.tenantIsolation: tenantId on every model and every query
safetyChecks.noApiKeyExposure: Provider selection is backend-only; frontend never sees API keys
safetyChecks.searchReadOnly: searchAll() only reads data — no writes
safetyChecks.autoLearnSafe: autoLearnFromConversation() only writes preferred_command and preferred_language — no sensitive data captured
safetyChecks.claudeOptional: provider defaults to 'mock' (Reno Brain); Claude integration noted but not enforced

mandatoryRule: STOPPED. Do not start Phase 39 until Phase 38 is reviewed and approved by ChatGPT.
